Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search CRM for Mosaic Robotics using crm_search_companies or crm_search_deals with a query related to "Mosaic" (or similar). Discover company_mosaic and active deals including the Zara Okoye relocation in damage / at_risk context.
OE 2: List CRM engagements for Mosaic Robotics using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_mosaic"]). Discover damage-incident engagement: $90,000 prototype value, $50,000 vendor liability cap, ~$40,000 MoveOps gap, Blessing Okafor remote sign-off (Philadelphia), Heartland Movers work order HM-WO-04142026-OKOYE, Tamara Byrd escalation.
OE 3: Search email using search_emails with a query related to "Mosaic", "prototype", "damage", "Tamara", or "Zara" (or similar). Discover formal client escalation and incident-report demands to MoveOps leadership.
OE 4: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with a query related to "prototype", "damage", "Blessing", "Okoye", or "Mosaic" (or similar). Discover #operations / coordinator context and Marcus Thorne #finance exposure scenarios ($0 to $90K-style framing) tied to the damage thread.
OE 5: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_bills, quickbooks_search_invoices, or quickbooks_show_data with a query related to "Mosaic", "damage", "accrual", or "ACCRUAL-2026-0415-MOSAIC" (or similar). Discover $90,000 contingent liability accrual ACCRUAL-2026-0415-MOSAIC and cap/gap structure for book-backed briefing numbers.
OE 6: Search Linear using linear_list_issues or linear_get_issue with a query related to "DOT", "PHMSA", "hazmat", "placarding", "compliance", or "Tanaka" (or similar). Discover DOT compliance audit project issues OPS-1 through OPS-5 (Zhao done, Tanaka in_progress / missing placarding cert, Patel/Reyes done, Swift cert todo).
OE 7: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_bills or quickbooks_show_data with a query related to "DOT", "PHMSA", "penalty", or "ACCRUAL-DOT-2026-001" (or similar). Discover $50,000 accrual ACCRUAL-DOT-2026-001 for PHMSA Case No. PHMSA-2026-04-1187.
OE 8: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with a query related to "PHMSA", "DOT", "hazmat", "compliance", or "placarding" (or similar). Discover formal inquiry context, $59,017/day penalty framing, coordinator documentation inventory, Blessing Okafor missing Tanaka placarding certificate admission.
OE 9: Search email using search_emails with a query related to "PHMSA", "DOT", "extension", "June 2026", "May 21", "deadline", or "Linda Castellano" (or similar). Discover regulatory response clock for the briefing (e.g., extended documentation deadline June 5, 2026, and related May 2026 correspondence).
OE 10: Search CRM for Terraform / Vantage using crm_search_companies or crm_search_deals with a query related to "Terraform", "Vantage", or "company-terraform-digital" (or similar). Discover company-terraform-digital (Vantage Distributed), ~$1,850,000 enterprise deal, Q2 relocation batch.
OE 11: List CRM engagements for Terraform/Vantage using crm_list_engagements. Discover reply-all / pricing-leak engagement: Catalina Dubois, 25% margin floor and tiered discounts exposed to Rachel Nguyen (terraformdigital.com), Elena response directive.
OE 12: Search email using search_emails with a query related to "Terraform", "Vantage", "reply-all", "pricing", or "Rachel Nguyen" (or similar). Discover internal pricing thread, accidental client disclosure, client reply treating leaked tiers as expectation.
OE 13: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with a query related to "Terraform", "reply-all", "pricing", "Catalina", or "customer-engagement" (or similar). Discover David Chen escalation and leadership-visible discussion paths (including #executive C004 context).
OE 14: Look up Elena Rostova and Priya Chakrabarti using contacts_search_contacts or contacts_get_contacts with a query related to "Elena", "Priya", "Rostova", or "Chakrabarti" (or similar). Confirm elena.rostova@moveops.com and priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com for briefing email To/CC.
OE 15: List Elena Rostova’s calendar for the current week using calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to, calendar_search_events, or calendar_read_today_calendar_events (or similar). For this task universe, discover no existing event whose title or description clearly blocks board prep / board chair preparation.
OE 16: Create a Linear issue using linear_create_issue for Mosaic prototype damage, vendor liability / Heartland, and Zara Okoye claim, no pre-existing Linear issue fully tracks this incident separately from DOT OPS work.
OE 17: Create a Linear issue using linear_create_issue for Terraform/Vantage pricing leak, reply-all, and Catalina/Rachel client disclosure response, no pre-existing ticket tracks this incident end-to-end.
OE 18: Create a CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement on Mosaic Robotics (company_mosaic) summarizing damage, liability, insurance cap/gap, and current status for sales/CE alignment.
OE 19: Create a CRM engagement using crm_create_engagement on Vantage Distributed (company-terraform-digital) summarizing reply-all pricing leak, client expectation risk, and response status.
OE 20: Send briefing email using send_email to elena.rostova@moveops.com, CC priya.chakrabarti@moveops.com. Parameters/body intent: all four threads, board-level stakes; book-backed figures from financial records where applicable; open vs resolved and owners; regulatory clock or explicit none, cross-thread ties (Mosaic, Blessing, Heartland, Terraform names where recurring); decisions for Elena; accurate pipeline/deal-stage statements only if crm_update_deal_stage was actually executed. Do not send_email to @mosaicrobotics.com or @terraformdigital.com recipients.
OE 21: Post summary using conversations_add_message to Slack channel C004 (#executive). No dollar amounts; no sensitive pricing leak specifics (e.g., 25% margin floor / tier structure).
OE 22: Add calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event on Elena’s calendar this week with title or description referencing board prep / board briefing / board chair preparation, after confirming no existing board prep event via a calendar read tool (read-before-write).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

📋 Rubrics
Rubric Results
✓ Pass ✗ Fail Click any row to expand justifications
# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 The model must use a CRM read tool (e.g., crm_search_companies, crm_search_deals, crm_list_engagements, or crm_get_company) to retrieve client account, deal, or engagement data.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called crm_search_companies (for 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Vantage', 'Vantage Distributed', 'Terraform Digital'), crm_search_deals (for 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', by company_id), and crm_get_contact / crm_search_contacts — all CRM read tools that retrieved client account and deal data.
✓Run #2The trajectory shows multiple CRM read tool calls: crm_search_companies called with 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Vantage', 'Terraform Digital'; crm_search_deals called with 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Vantage'; and crm_get_deal called on deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1. These all preceded the CRM update actions.
✓Run #3The trajectory includes multiple CRM read tool calls: crm_search_deals for 'Terraform' and 'Mosaic', and crm_search_companies for 'Terraform', 'Mosaic', and 'Vantage'. These retrieved client account and deal data.
✓Run #4The trajectory includes crm_search_companies (for 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Terraform Digital', 'Vantage') and crm_search_deals (for 'Mosaic' and 'Terraform'), confirming CRM read tools were used to retrieve client account and deal data.
✓Run #5The trajectory includes multiple crm_search_companies calls (for 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Terraform Digital', 'Vantage', 'Vantage Distributed') and crm_search_deals calls (for 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Vectral'). These CRM read tools were used to retrieve client account and deal data.
✓Run #6The trajectory contains multiple CRM read tool calls: crm_search_companies with 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Vantage', and 'NorthWind'; and crm_search_deals with 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', and 'NorthWind'. These calls returned Mosaic Robotics (company_mosaic) and Vantage Distributed (company-terraform-digital) data, satisfying the criterion.
2 The model must use a Linear read tool (e.g., linear_list_issues, linear_get_issue, or linear_list_comments) to retrieve DOT, PHMSA, hazmat, or compliance-related issues.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called linear_list_issues with query 'DOT', which is a Linear read tool searching for DOT/compliance-related issues. Additional linear_list_issues calls were made for 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Heartland', 'damage claim insurance', 'insurance broker', 'hazmat training', and 'invoicing gate compliance'.
✓Run #2The trajectory includes linear_list_issues called with query 'DOT compliance', as well as additional linear_list_issues calls with 'Mosaic damage', 'Terraform', and a broad limit:50 call. These are Linear read tool calls retrieving compliance-related issues.
✓Run #3The trajectory includes linear_list_issues with query 'DOT', which directly retrieves DOT/compliance-related issues. Additional linear_list_issues calls for 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'Heartland', 'accrual', and 'insurance claim' were also made.
✓Run #4The trajectory includes multiple linear_list_issues calls with queries including 'DOT', 'hazmat', 'Mosaic insurance', 'Heartland', and 'prototype damage', satisfying the requirement to use a Linear read tool for compliance-related issues.
✓Run #5The trajectory includes a linear_list_issues call with query 'DOT compliance', which is specifically searching for compliance-related issues. Additional linear_list_issues calls were made for 'Mosaic damage', 'Terraform', 'Heartland', and 'insurance'.
✓Run #6The trajectory includes linear_list_issues calls with queries 'DOT', 'Mosaic', 'Terraform', 'hazard', 'insurance', and 'Heartland'. The 'DOT' query specifically targets DOT/PHMSA compliance issues, and the 'Heartland' query returned a result file with linear issues. This satisfies the criterion of using a Linear read tool to retrieve DOT/compliance-related issues.
3 The model must use a QuickBooks read tool (e.g., quickbooks_search_bills, quickbooks_search_invoices, or quickbooks_show_data) to retrieve bill or accrual data tied to Mosaic damage, DOT/PHMSA penalties, or related exposure.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called quickbooks_search_invoices with CustomerRef 'Mosaic' and DocNumber 'INV-2026-0411', and quickbooks_search_bills targeting Heartland. While many calls returned errors, the tools were used to attempt retrieval of bill and accrual data tied to Mosaic damage and related exposure. The criterion requires use of the tool, not successful results.
✓Run #2The trajectory includes quickbooks_search_invoices called for INV-2026-0411 (Mosaic), quickbooks_search_bills with fetchAll:true, and quickbooks_search_accounts with fetchAll:true. These are QuickBooks read tool calls to retrieve accrual and bill data tied to the relevant situations.
✓Run #3The trajectory includes quickbooks_search_bills (fetchAll: true), quickbooks_search_invoices, and quickbooks_search_accounts calls. These were used to retrieve bill/accrual data including Mosaic damage and DOT penalty accruals.
✓Run #4The trajectory includes quickbooks_search_invoices (for INV-2026-0411 and Mosaic CustomerRef) and quickbooks_search_bills (fetchAll: true), satisfying the requirement to use QuickBooks read tools to retrieve bill/accrual data.
✓Run #5The trajectory includes quickbooks_search_bills (fetchAll:true), quickbooks_search_accounts (fetchAll:true), and quickbooks_search_invoices (for INV-2026-0411). These were used to retrieve bills, accruals, and financial data related to Mosaic damage and DOT penalties.
✓Run #6The trajectory includes quickbooks_search_invoices calls for DocNumber 'INV-2026-0411' and 'INV-2026-0412', both returning output files with data. These invoices are tied to the Mosaic damage claim and related financial exposure. Additional quickbooks_search_bills and quickbooks_search_accounts calls were made (though some errored). The successful invoice searches constitute QuickBooks read tool use for Mosaic-related financial data.
4 The model must use a calendar read tool (e.g., calendar_read_today_calendar_events, calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to, or calendar_search_events) on Elena's calendar before any calendar_add_calendar_event in the trajectory.
tool selection
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to and calendar_search_events (for 'board') before calling calendar_add_calendar_event. The read tools appear earlier in the trajectory than the add call.
✓Run #2calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to was called (returning empty results) before calendar_add_calendar_event was invoked to add the board prep block. The read occurred at timestamp 2026-03-23T20:58:59 and the add occurred at 2026-03-23T21:00:52.
✓Run #3calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to was called (timestamp 2026-03-23T21:17:51) before calendar_add_calendar_event (timestamp 2026-03-23T21:20:35). The read tool was used first.
✓Run #4calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to was called (checking 2026-04-26 to 2026-05-02) before the calendar_add_calendar_event call. The calendar read precedes the add, satisfying the check-then-schedule requirement.
✓Run #5The trajectory shows calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to was called (returning empty results) before the calendar_add_calendar_event call for board prep. The read tool precedes the write tool in the trajectory.
✓Run #6The trajectory shows calendar_read_today_calendar_events, calendar_get_calendar_events_from_to (twice), and calendar_search_events calls all occurring before the calendar_add_calendar_event call. The calendar was checked first, no existing board prep was found, and only then was the event added.
5 The model must successfully send an email (via send_email) to [elena.rostova@moveops.com](mailto:elena.rostova@moveops.com), and the tool response must indicate success.
outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The send_email tool was called with recipients including 'elena.rostova@moveops.com' and the response returned a successful email_id: 'beff1f2a68fa463a907019b239925736', indicating success.

The email's stated stage ('proposalMade') does not match the actual successful tool call outcome ('presentationscheduled'), making the email's pipeline claim inconsistent with the trajectory.
